tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"find /usr/share -type d -perm -o+rx | wc -l; find /usr/share -type f -name '*.png' -readable | wc -l; su -s /bin/sh -c 'set -o pipefail; out=$(find /usr/share -name \"*.png\" -type f -not -path \"*/.*\" -size -500k 2>/dev/null | head -5); rc=$?; printf \"OUT<<%s>>\\nRC=%s\\n\" \"$out\" \"$rc\"' agent"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content: find /usr/share -type d -perm -o+rx | wc -l; find /usr/share -type f -name '*.png' -readable | wc -l; su -s /bin/sh -c 'set -o pipefail; out=$(find /usr/share -name "*.png" -type f -not -path "*/.*" -size -500k 2>/dev/null | head -5); rc=$?; printf "OUT<<%s>>\nRC=%s\n" "$out" "$rc"' agent

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"chmod o-rx /usr/share /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons /usr/share/icons/Humanity /usr/share/icons/Humanity/emblems /usr/share/icons/Humanity/emblems/16; chmod o-r /usr/share/pixmaps/*.png /usr/share/icons/Humanity/emblems/16/*.png 2>/dev/null; su -s /bin/sh -c 'set -o pipefail; out=$(find /usr/share -name \"*.png\" -type f -not -path \"*/.*\" -size -500k 2>/dev/null | head -5); rc=$?; printf \"OUT<<%s>>\\nRC=%s\\n\" \"$out\" \"$rc\"' agent; stat -c '%A %n' /usr/share /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons /usr/share/icons/Humanity /usr/share/icons/Humanity/emblems /usr/share/icons/Humanity/emblems/16 | sed -n '1,6p'"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
chmod o-rx /usr/share /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/sshare/icons /usr/share/icons/Humanity /usr/share/icons/Humanity/emblems /usr/sharre/icons/Humanity/emblems/16; chmod o-r /usr/share/pixmaps/*.png /usr/share/iconss/Humanity/emblems/16/*.png 2>/dev/null; su -s /bin/sh -c 'set -o pipefail; out=$$(find /usr/share -name "*.png" -type f -not -path "*/.*" -size -500k 2>/dev/nulll | head -5); rc=$?; printf "OUT<<%s>>\nRC=%s\n" "$out" "$rc"' agent; stat -c '%AA %n' /usr/share /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons /usr/share/icons/Humanity /uusr/share/icons/Humanity/emblems /usr/share/icons/Humanity/emblems/16 | sed -n '11,6p'
sh: 1: set: Illegal option -o pipefail
drwxr-x--- /usr/share
drwxr-x--- /usr/share/pixmaps
drwxr-x--- /usr/share/icons
drwxr-x--- /usr/share/icons/Humanity
drwxr-x--- /usr/share/icons/Humanity/emblems
drwxr-x--- /usr/share/icons/Humanity/emblems/16
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
su -s /bin/sh -c 'out=$(find /usr/share -name ""*.png" -type f -not -path "*/.*" -size -500k 2>/dev/null | head -5); rc=$?; prinntf "OUT<<%s>>\nRC=%s\n" "$out" "$rc"' agent
OUT<<>>
RC=0
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#
